candidates.title: LUXURY Real Estate Marketing Specialist/Designer
candidates.brief: A luxury real estate agent in Los Angeles is looking for an experienced luxury real estate marketing specialist / designer with a strong editorial eye and proven experience working with luxury real estate and luxury brands. We need someone with refined taste, clean design, and an understanding of how to market to affluent buyers and sellers. Scope of work may include: -Canva template design and creation -Social media marketing design and ideas for social media campaign -Social media post, story, and reel cover templates creation -Listing presentation design and template creation -Postcards, brochures, flyers, and email blast design and template creation -Property marketing campaign concepts -Brand consistency across digital and print materials Requirements: -Proficiency in Canva -Strong luxury / editorial aesthetic -Experience with luxury real estate branding or high-end lifestyle market

candidates.title: Real Estate Flyer Designer Needed
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price We are seeking a talented designer to create a real estate flyer for a new listing. The flyer should be visually appealing and effectively communicate the property's features and benefits. The ideal candidate will have experience in real estate design and a strong portfolio showcasing their work. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this role. candidates.title: Adobe InDesign Proposal & Statement of Qualifications (SOQ) Template System for Engineering Firm
candidates.tools: InDesign — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: Salem Engineering Group, Inc. is seeking an experienced Adobe InDesign designer to create a professional proposal and Statement of Qualifications (SOQ) template system for engineering, environmental, geotechnical, drilling, materials testing, and public agency projects. This is NOT a request for a single proposal template. We are seeking a complete, reusable proposal system that can be maintained internally by our staff after Adobe InDesign training. The completed system should allow our staff to quickly create professional proposals by replacing project-specific information, staff resumes, project experience sheets, references, and photographs while maintaining a consistent company brand and appearance. SCOPE OF WORK The selected designer shall create: • Proposal Cover Page Template • Cover Letter Template • Automatic Table of Contents Template • Section Divider Pages • Standard Content

candidates.title: Experienced Graphic Designer Needed for Architectural Master Plans & Floor Plans from CAD Files
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: We are looking for an experienced graphic designer / architectural visualisation specialist to create high-quality master plans, floor plans, and presentation-style architectural layouts for an upcoming real estate development project. The designer will work from the CAD files, architectural drawings, site plans, and project references we provide. The final output should be clean, modern, visually attractive, and suitable for use in marketing materials, investor presentations, brochures, websites, and sales presentations. We are looking for a style similar to the attached examples: elegant architectural presentation boards, refined master plan visuals, clean floor plan graphics, landscape/site plan rendering, and modern real estate presentation layouts. Project Scope The project will include 7 different villa types. For each villa type, we will need professional floor plan graphics based
